title: pyrethrum macrophyllum
intro: Pyrethrum macrophyllum, also known as the tall pyrethrum or creeping daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The plant's flowers and leaves contain bioactive compounds that offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Pyrethrum macrophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
